hero.title: Discover Pilsen
hero.subtitle: Let me guide you through Pilsen on running routes with a personal guide. You'll see the city from a completely different perspective — fast, healthy and with a great atmosphere.

features.title: Why run with me?
features.subtitle: I combine a passion for running with deep knowledge of Pilsen

personal.title: Personal Approach
personal.desc: Every run is tailored to your pace, fitness, and goals. No racing — just enjoyable movement.

city.title: City Knowledge
city.desc: 10+ years of running in Pilsen. I know every corner, view, and hidden park.

health.title: Healthy Movement
health.desc: Proper technique, warm-up and stretching. I'll make sure you only feel good fatigue afterwards.

flexible.title: Flexible Times
flexible.desc: Morning, afternoon and evening slots. I'll adapt to your schedule.

routes.title: Routes in Pilsen
routes.subtitle: Choose a route based on your preferences and fitness level

historicCenter.name: Historic Centre
historicCenter.description: Circuit through Republic Square, the Great Synagogue, Pilsner Urquell Brewery and along the Radbuza river.

borsky.name: Borský Park & Surroundings
borsky.description: Peaceful route through Borský Park, the zoo and Lochotin Park. Perfect for beginners.

divadlo.name: Cultural Route
divadlo.description: Past cultural landmarks — J.K. Tyl Theatre, West Bohemian Museum, Kopecký Gardens.

river.name: Along the Rivers
river.description: Romantic route along the Radbuza and Mže rivers from Klatovská avenue to the confluence of four rivers.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Pavel Hubáček — your guide to Pilsen
about.bio1: I'm a passionate runner and local guide who loves Pilsen. I've been running for over 15 years and have explored every corner of this beautiful city.
about.bio2: My mission is simple: to show you Pilsen as you've never seen it — from a runner's perspective, at a pace that suits you, with stories you didn't know about the city.
about.bio3: Whether you're a beginner or an experienced runner, I'll tailor the route and pace exactly to you. Come discover Pilsen with me!

contact.title: Book Your Run
contact.subtitle: Fill in the form and I'll get back to you within 24 hours

cta.title: Ready for your first run?
cta.subtitle: Book your slot today and discover Pilsen from a new perspective.

home.title: Běhej Městem — Running Guide in Pilsen

routes.title: Routes | Běhej Městem
routes.description: Browse running routes in Pilsen. From the historic centre to parks and rivers — each route offers a different view of the city.

about.title: About | Běhej Městem
